settings.heading: Built for her body.
settings.subheading: One honest morning scoop — 5g creatine + 5g Verisol® collagen and a complete multivitamin, each at the studied amount. Nothing hidden, nothing vague. Tested for purity, every single batch.

settings.title:
Creatine
monohydrate
settings.body: One of the most-studied supplement ingredients there is. Creatine increases physical performance in successive bursts of short-term, high-intensity exercise — strength on your own terms, at the studied daily amount.

settings.title:
Verisol®
collagen peptides
settings.body: The full 5g of Verisol® bioactive collagen peptides — the branded, studied peptide. Alongside it, biotin and vitamin C contribute to the maintenance of normal skin, and vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation.

settings.title:
The
cofactors
settings.body: Eleven supporting compounds, every one disclosed: myo + D-chiro inositol 40:1 (500mg — studied in PCOS research), dandelion root and cranberry PAC (both traditionally used botanicals), hyaluronic acid, and a complete multivitamin at 100% NRV.
settings.evidence: Every dose printed on the label

settings.title: Scoop 14g
settings.body: One level scoop — 5g creatine, 5g Verisol® collagen and the complete multivitamin, all in.

settings.title: Shake with 200ml
settings.body: Cold water, 10 seconds. It turns the softest pink — strawberry lemonade, naturally flavoured, no added sugar.

settings.title: Drink every morning
settings.body: Training days and rest days. The dose works by showing up daily — same as you.

settings.title: Days 1–7 · half scoop
settings.body: 7g in 200ml of cold water, every morning. Half the dose, same ritual — you're building the habit first.

settings.title: Day 8 onwards · full scoop
settings.body: Move up to the full 14g scoop. This is the studied daily amount — from here, it's just consistency.

settings.title: Miss a day?
settings.body: Just carry on the next morning. No doubling up, no guilt. The ritual works because it's kind.

settings.question: What exactly is in The Daily?
settings.answer: 13 actives in one 14g scoop: 5g creatine monohydrate (Creapure®), 5g Verisol® bioactive collagen peptides, myo + D-chiro inositol 40:1 (500mg), dandelion root (250mg), hyaluronic acid (100mg), cranberry PAC (36mg), and a complete multivitamin at 100% NRV — biotin 5,000µg, L-methylfolate 400µg, B6 as P-5-P, chromium, vitamin C, vegan D3, plus vitamins A · E · K2 and a full B-complex. Every dose is printed on the label. Nothing hidden, nothing vague.

settings.question: Is it really halal certified?
settings.answer: Yes — certified under HMC protocol GB18/2026, including source-of-slaughter certification for the bovine collagen. That last part matters: most collagen brands can't tell you how the animal was slaughtered. We can, and the certificate is available on request.

settings.question: Is creatine safe for women?
settings.answer: Creatine monohydrate is one of the most-studied supplement ingredients there is, and 5g a day is the amount used across that research — in women as well as men. The authorised claim is specific: creatine increases physical performance in successive bursts of short-term, high-intensity exercise. It's a food supplement for healthy adults; if you take medication or manage a condition, check with your GP first.

settings.question: Will it make me bulky?
settings.answer: No supplement changes your body shape on its own — that's training and time, on your terms. Creatine at the studied 5g supports performance in short, high-intensity efforts; what you build with that is entirely up to you.

settings.question: Can I take it while pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.answer: No. The Daily is for healthy adults and is not suitable if you are pregnant or breastfeeding. If you're taking medication or managing a condition, please consult your GP before starting any supplement.

settings.question: How do I take it?
settings.answer: One level 14g scoop, shaken with 200ml of cold water for 10 seconds, every morning — training days and rest days. New to it? Start with a half scoop (7g) for your first 7 days: the gentle way to start.

settings.question: What does it taste like?
settings.answer: Strawberry lemonade — naturally flavoured, no added sugar. And if you hate it, our 30-day flavour guarantee means we refund the pouch. That simple.

settings.question: When will I notice anything?
settings.answer: Honestly: it depends on the ingredient and on you, and no brand can promise you a date. Creatine's performance effect builds as your stores saturate over the first weeks of daily use; collagen studies typically run eight weeks or more. The one thing every study shares is daily consistency — which is why we built The Daily around one simple morning ritual.

settings.question: Where does the 20% actually go?
settings.answer: 20% of profits — audited annually — goes to refuge, care and crisis support for women, through vetted partners across eight causes. Every pouch earns 2 charity tokens in the HerBody app, and you choose where your share lands. We publish the audit; we don't do guilt, and we don't do hero stories.

settings.question: What about shipping and returns?
settings.answer: Free UK shipping, 1–2 days, from London. If the flavour isn't for you, tell us within 30 days and we refund the pouch — no return postage, no questions. Subscriptions can be paused or cancelled anytime.
